prompt: Review the changes in PR #22214 (branch origin/pr/22214 targeting main).

assertions.text: Review includes a complexity/split advisory for the large 75+ file scope
Checks frontend-specific breaking changes (exports, custom elements) not just backend
Findings reference specific files with line numbers
Properly deprecated code is NOT flagged as Critical breaking change
Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
